key_insights: 9 turns where agents held contradictory beliefs about key/door
1 wasted turns (waits + failed moves) out of 70 total

causal_chain.summary: Worst: agent_a held stale other_agent_position for 8 turns (T3→T11, resolved). 6 total stale windows across all fields and agents.

recommendations.finding: Agents held contradictory beliefs about key/door for 9 turns. This means both agents were planning around different versions of reality simultaneously — neither could make optimal decisions.
recommendations.recommendation: Add explicit acknowledgment in the BELIEFS block: when an agent receives a message about a key fact (key location, door status), it should echo back 'confirmed: key held by agent_X' in its next message. This closes the loop and prevents silent belief divergence between partners.
recommendations.expected_impact: Reduces coordination gap turns from 9 toward 0. Agents operating on consistent state make non-conflicting plans.

recommendations.finding: Agent A had stale other-agent position for 8 turns (T3–T11). Believed partner at '(3, 4)', actually at '(6, 7)'.
recommendations.recommendation: Add periodic position pings: agents should broadcast their position every 3 turns when actively coordinating, especially near the key or door. Stale partner position prevents effective task splitting.
recommendations.expected_impact: Reduces coordination gaps from partner position uncertainty. Enables agents to divide exploration quadrants without overlap.

recommendations.finding: Context window grew 3.1x over the run (1443 → 4470 tokens). Latency scaled with context: first turn 8211ms, last turn 3811ms.
recommendations.recommendation: Implement a sliding context window: keep only the last 10 turns of conversation history for the API call. Store full history locally for tracing but cap what the LLM sees. Alternatively, inject a periodic 'SUMMARY: key facts so far' message and truncate before it.
recommendations.expected_impact: Caps token usage at ~4329 input tokens instead of growing to 4470+. Stabilizes latency regardless of run length.
